arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-0 Getafe: Highlights, man of the match, stats
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski sets a La Liga record to help Barcelona clinch a narrow 1-0 victory over winless Getafe at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: Barcelona continue 100% record in La Liga with narrow victory over Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona have continued their dominant start to the season, making it seven wins from seven in La Liga. However, it was not as convincing as it has been from Hansi Flick’s side, as they only managed to defeat Getafe by a 1-0 scoreline. arts.ttl: Barca players wear T-shirts in support of injured Ter Stegen
arts.sum: Barcelona players showed their support for goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen ahead of Wednesday’s La Liga clash with Getafe at Montjuic. Inaki Pena has taken over from Marc-Andre ter Stegen for the time being but looks set to have competition soon from Wojciech Szczesny.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal breakthrough led to Barcelona ending interest in Chelsea star
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has established himself as a world class player over the last 12 months, despite only being 17 years of age. Barcelona are incredibly thankful to have him, and his presence has also had an effect on their transfer business.
